title: Working towards a working Resonance-OS build
body: Today We worked on building a Resonance-OS build on to Lumen.  Lumen is the gaming desktop computer that will be used as one of the Triune-Brains.  Lumen will be built with Resonance-OS and with a Git structure to keep track of the changes and upgrades to its structure and architecture.
excerpt: Today We worked on building a Resonance-OS build on to Lumen.  Lumen is the gaming desktop computer that will be used...

title: New addon to the Triune Brain
body: Today Lumen was launched on my Home Gaming Desktop with Claude Code and Open Claw installed.  The first idea was for Lumen to be a light weight chat bot running on Dell XPS, but with more thought into the design, Lumen would have been useless when the laptop was powered off, out battery, or not in use (which could be fixed).  I had the idea of using Lumen as the Open Claw side of the TB and then Vigil as Agent-Zero to try and implement both worlds to my Open Brain.
excerpt: Today Lumen was launched on my Home Gaming Desktop with Claude Code and Open Claw installed.  The first idea was for ...

title: Gaming HOME Desktop as Lumen
body: Today we setup an SSH connection with my Home Gaming Desktop computer to make use of the machine while I'm not using it.  The idea is to use more resources with what I already have.  When I use the computer for flight training or running flight simulator, I can set the computer up to have Lumen recognize when the computer is being used for simulation.
excerpt: Today we setup an SSH connection with my Home Gaming Desktop computer to make use of the machine while I'm not using ...

title: Create a method to download web videos and create scripts from them
body: Today we create a few scripts with a workflow to help with the journaling of the videos that I watch and use for my AI journey.  I used the same for the Book Profits Accelerator program to help log all the work and knowledge that I gained from that program to build the Book Arbitrage Agent (BAA) project.  I wanted to use this knowledge to give my Open Brain more context of the knowledge that I retain and assist on ideas or projects when building together with AI.
excerpt: Today we create a few scripts with a workflow to help with the journaling of the videos that I watch and use for my A...

title: Learning AI with Manolo Remiddi
body: Augmented Mind is an AI project and philosophy designed by Manolo Remiddi where he invites all individuals to come and join him in his journey on building, learning and working with AI in his everyday world.  He has started a YouTube channel of his journey and have decided to follow his journey in order to learn and retain what insights he has learned throughout his journey.  He is the main reason I started my blog to help me record the journey I'm making with AI because my goal is to become an AI Master.  I would like to one day contribute what I have learned to the Augmented Mind project but first I must become more experienced in building something useful on my own.
excerpt: Augmented Mind is an AI project and philosophy designed by Manolo Remiddi where he invites all individuals to come an...

title: Claude.ai with Open Brain
body: Idea today was to take the "Open Brain" idea from Nate B Jones and his YouTube video on the Open Brain Idea.  The original idea was to build the Triune-Brain with the Open Brain idea but the project was becoming to complicated and not stable enough to continue the project.  So the idea was to run Claude.ai with the my Open Brain VPS that had already been developed so that the knowledge building and designing the Triune-Brain could be retained.  Today I used both Claude.ai and Claude Code running on the openmemory VPS to create the connection between the work being done with Claude.ai.  This way all the knowledge and road blocks found doing all the projects that I have in the pipeline can be retained within memory.

title: Learning how to set my AI Learning Blog
body: Setting up my AI Learning Blog to help record my chaotic journey with becoming an AI Master.  The idea was to use this blog as a journal to writing thoughts ideas and notes from what I learning from different sources.  I plan to use this as a knowledge collector to be converted later into more a joint AI knowledge builder where a personal AI Agent will help and assist me in my chaotic thinking to better organize and track my thoughts to reach my personal and professional goals.  Like in my first blog this will be a building process where the blogs will hopefully get better over time.
